issues.label: 22A
issues.text: 22A. For consistency with the shared deontic mapping attachments, this motion's dispositive preclusion branch is identified as Rule ID R-PI-01 (collateral-estoppel branch).

issues.label: 22B
issues.text: 22B. Under Rule ID R-PI-01, no dispositive dismissal is requested unless the certified row-by-row element map is complete for the specific issue row at issue.

issues.label: 22C
issues.text: 22C. Any non-dispositive overlap/scope handling requested in this motion is presented as threshold sequencing only and not as completion of Rule ID R-PI-01.

issues.label: 22D
issues.text: 22D. To the extent collateral housing-merits scope-control is considered in this motion, that handling is non-dispositive and corresponds to Rule ID R-JN-01 as mapped in the companion scope-control filings.

issues.label: 22E
issues.text: 22E. Any uncertified status note, oral relay, or summary chart is offered as context only and not as completed proof of a dispositive preclusion element.

issues.label: 21B
issues.text: 21B. For consistency with the shared deontic mapping attachments, the ORCP 29B fallback branch in this motion is Rule ID R-JN-01.

issues.label: 21C
issues.text: 21C. The ORCP 22C derivative-liability limit branch in this motion is Rule ID R-JN-02.

issues.label: 21D
issues.text: 21D. Any final feasibility finding requested under Rule ID R-JN-01 is conditioned on the filed service-attempt proof identified in paragraph 21A.
1. I am over 18 years of age and competent to testify to the matters stated herein.
